⚑ Phase 1 — Critical Funding Needed

Township Approvals Secured. Help Us Open.

The Township of Howell has granted approval to open for prayer and religious services. Phase 1 requires completion of site plan improvements — paving, landscaping, and site work — to unlock the doors for worship. With your support, we can open with 28 congregants in our existing building as soon as possible.

Who We Are

More Than a Place of Worship —
A Community Home

The Turkish American Religious Foundation (TARF), in affiliation with Diyanet of Turkey, is building a spiritual and cultural home in Howell, New Jersey. Our vision goes beyond prayer — we are creating a space where families gather, children learn, and generations are shaped by faith and community.

Every contribution you make today is an investment in this community — for us, for our children, and for the generations to come. Inshallah.

Phase 1 Details

Township approvals are in hand. The remaining requirement before we can open for prayer and religious services is completion of our site plan improvements — including paving, landscaping, and additional site work required by the Township. Your donation brings us directly to the finish line.

Our Mosque

The Property & Our Vision

Learn about the land, the building, and what this mosque will become for our community.

The Property

Our mosque is situated on a generous 17+ acre property at 4 Windeler Road in Howell, New Jersey — a township that has long welcomed diverse communities. This land represents a rare opportunity to build not just a mosque, but a full community campus for generations to come.

The existing single-story building will serve as our initial house of worship, with the Township of Howell having granted approval for prayer and religious services. The same approvals include use of the building as an Imam residence, ensuring pastoral care is always close at hand.

17+

28
Prayer Capacity (Phase 1)
✓
Site Plan Improvements Underway
✓

Existing Building

The existing structure is a single-story building that will serve as the heart of Phase 1 operations — housing prayer services, religious gatherings, and the Imam’s residence.

Find Us

We are located at 4 Windeler Road, Howell, NJ 07731.

📍 Open in Google Maps →

Phase 1 — Opening for Prayer

The Township of Howell has granted all necessary approvals for the mosque to open for prayer and religious services. The remaining requirement is completion of site plan improvements including paving, landscaping, and additional site work required by the Township.

Once Phase 1 is complete, the mosque will be open for daily prayers and Friday Jumu’ah services, with capacity for 28 congregants.


Donate to Phase 1

Looking Ahead

Our 17+ acres give us enormous potential. Phase 1 is just the beginning. Future phases will expand our capacity for education, services, and worship. Stay connected as we grow this project, inshallah.

Events Are on the Way

As we work toward opening our doors for Phase 1, we are laying the groundwork for a vibrant calendar of events — from daily prayers and Friday Jumu’ah, to educational programs, community iftars, and celebrations for future generations.

Inshallah, this page will soon be filled with the events that bring our community together. Follow us on social media for the latest updates.

"The Prophet (ﷺ) said: Whoever builds a mosque for Allah, Allah will build for him a house in Paradise." — Sahih al-Bukhari

About Us

The Turkish American Religious Foundation

Who we are, where we come from, and what we stand for.

Our Organization

The Turkish American Religious Foundation (TARF), in affiliation with Diyanet of Turkey, is a faith-based nonprofit organization dedicated to serving the Muslim community in the United States. We are rooted in the traditions of Turkish Islamic scholarship and committed to serving all members of our community with openness, dignity, and care.

The TARF Howell Sadiklar Mosque project in Howell, New Jersey represents a significant milestone for our foundation — the establishment of a permanent home for worship, learning, and community life in Monmouth County.

Our Mission

To provide prayer, religious services, and community programs that enrich the lives of Muslim families and serve the broader community in Howell, NJ and beyond.

Our Affiliation

We operate in affiliation with Diyanet of Turkey, drawing on a rich tradition of Islamic scholarship, education, and community service to guide our work.

Our Community

We welcome all — the TARF Howell Sadiklar Mosque is a home for Turkish Americans, the broader Muslim community, and anyone who wishes to learn, connect, and grow.

Our Vision

A thriving community center offering prayer, education, youth programs, and social services on our 17+ acre property for generations to come, inshallah.
